verdicts.closed: every transitively required support dependency is disclosed, present, effective, and reached
verdicts.open: a required dependency is concealed, absent, ineffective, invalid, or unsupported
verdicts.unknown: no failure is established but at least one required dependency remains unresolved

anti_evasion_rules: moving a decoder outside the visible representation does not remove it from closure
an oracle name is not support unless an effective realization is available
external state stores and identity registries are support machinery
scheduler and randomness semantics are included when they affect registered answers
proof objects and codebooks are included when required to interpret outputs
learned parameters and training artifacts are included only when operationally required for registered use
